title: AIAHL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: AI Assets Holding Limited (AIAHL) has released the official Chief Financial Officer Notification 2026 at AIAHL Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIAHL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Qualified Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant from the Institute of Cost Accountants of India and aged up to 62 years can apply offline on or before 02 June 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant from Institute of Cost Accountants of India.
qualification.details: Qualified Chartered Accountant from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India OR Cost Accountant from Institute of Cost Accountants of India. Should be a member of the Institute of Chartered Accountant of India or a member of the Cost & Works Accountants of India.

salary_details.details: Total Monthly Salary & Allowances of Rs.1,50,000/- (Salary-Rs.1,20,000/- + Allowances-Rs.30,000/-) with Annual increment @3% p.a.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIAHL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiahl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIAHL Chief Financial Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Chief Financial Officer post is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Financial Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Qualified Chartered Accountants from the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or Cost Accountants from the Institute of Cost Accountants of India, and be a member of either institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief Financial Officer role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Financial Officer position is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 120000 - 150000 Per Month, with total monthly salary and allowances of Rs. 1,50,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for the AIAHL Chief Financial Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Chief Financial Officer position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection methods for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Personal Interview and a Pre-Employment Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIAHL, which is www.aiahl.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Chief Financial Officer position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Chief Financial Officer position is Contractual.
